name: GIGABYTE B850M DS3H Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8200(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5Gb LAN
shortName: GIGABYTE B850M DS3H Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0
description: Gigabyte B850M DS3H Micro-ATX motherboard with PCIe 5.0, DDR5 support, and Wi-Fi 7 for AMD AM5 systems.
